TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Anthony_Anderson, title = Anthony_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anthony_Anderson} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 8, Anthony Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Anthony Anderson htagan beh sa Compton,California. yaya nya ga magal kkyalan bcyogun nya. mama nya ga kahul Little Rock.raral na syobay tbaziy lukus, misu lga musa maki mtzyaw m'usuw m'wiy na zyaw. 2002 kawas wal mhuqil sswe mlikuy nya. bincyogan nya pinqbaqan nya Anthony Anderson mqwas biru sa Hollywood pqwsan biru seneng. Anthony Anderson mqwas biru sa Howard pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Anthony Anderson hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1999, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 8, Anthony Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Anthony Anderson htagan beh sa Compton,California. yaya nya ga magal kkyalan bcyogun nya. mama nya ga kahul Little Rock.raral na syobay tbaziy lukus, misu lga musa maki mtzyaw m'usuw m'wiy na zyaw. 2002 kawas wal mhuqil sswe mlikuy nya. bincyogan nya pinqbaqan nya Anthony Anderson mqwas biru sa Hollywood pqwsan biru seneng. Anthony Anderson mqwas biru sa Howard pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Anthony Anderson hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1999, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, antƒßonj an*ers~…ïon, s~…ïquliq na Œ≤u≈ãe î. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) antƒßonj an*ers~…ïon ƒßta…£an Œ≤eƒß s~…ïa ¶~ ®ompton, ¶~ ®ali*ornia. jaja nja …£a ma…£al kkjalan Œ≤ ¶~ ®jo…£un nja. mama nja …£a kaƒßul little ro ¶~ ®k.raral na s~…ïjoŒ≤aj tŒ≤azij lukus~…ï, mis~…ïu l…£a mus~…ïa maki mtzjaw m îus~…ïuw m îwij na zjaw. **** kawas~…ï wal mƒßuqil s~…ïs~…ïwe mlikuj nja. Œ≤in ¶~ ®jo…£an nja pinqŒ≤aqan nja antƒßonj an*ers~…ïon mqwas~…ï Œ≤iru s~…ïa ƒßolljwoo* pqws~…ïan Œ≤iru s~…ïene≈ã. antƒßonj an*ers~…ïon mqwas~…ï Œ≤iru s~…ïa ƒßowar* pqws~…ïan Œ≤iru kraƒßu. mintzjuwaw nja antƒßonj an*ers~…ïon ƒßija …£a m îe≈ãi. t îari≈ã s~…ïa kawas~…ï ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na e≈ãi ru mqwas~…ï. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ï
